assessor_raw: Readmission prediction with transformer vs GBT: AUPRC choice is well-justified, exclusion criteria are symmetric, temporal design is correct. Comprehensive confound controls. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: Readmission prediction with transformer vs GBT: AUPRC choice is well-justified, exclusion criteria are symmetric, temporal design is correct. Comprehensive confound controls. Verdict: defense_wins.
